p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: ChartedSpace[T0, T1]) { is_charted_space_data[T0, T1](x0.atlas, x0.chart_at) }[M, E](c)

goal: is_charted_space_data[M, E](c.atlas, c.chart_at) = (forall(x0: M) { c.chart_at(x0).source.contains(x0) } and forall(x1: M) { c.atlas.contains(c.chart_at(x1)) })

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> Chart[T0, T1], x1: Set[Chart[T0, T1]]) { (forall(x2: T0) { x2 ∈ x0(x2).source } and forall(x3: T0) { x0(x3) ∈ x1 }) = is_charted_space_data[T0, T1](x1, x0) }[M, E](c.chart_at, c.atlas)
function[T0, T1](x0: ChartedSpace[T0, T1]) { is_charted_space_data[T0, T1](x0.atlas, x0.chart_at) }[M, E](c)
not is_charted_space_data[M, E](c.atlas, c.chart_at) or (forall(x0: M) { x0 ∈ c.chart_at(x0).source } and forall(x1: M) { c.chart_at(x1) ∈ c.atlas })
(forall(x2: M) { x2 ∈ c.chart_at(x2).source } = true)
function(x0: M) { x0 ∈ c.chart_at(x0).source }(x)
function[T0, T1](x0: ChartedSpace[T0, T1]) { is_charted_space_data[T0, T1](x0.atlas, x0.chart_at) }[M, E](c)

goal: is_charted_space_data[M, E](c.atlas, c.chart_at) = (forall(x0: M) { c.chart_at(x0).source.contains(x0) } and forall(x1: M) { c.atlas.contains(c.chart_at(x1)) })

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> Chart[T0, T1], x1: Set[Chart[T0, T1]]) { (forall(x2: T0) { x2 ∈ x0(x2).source } and forall(x3: T0) { x0(x3) ∈ x1 }) = is_charted_space_data[T0, T1](x1, x0) }[M, E](c.chart_at, c.atlas)
function[T0, T1](x0: ChartedSpace[T0, T1]) { is_charted_space_data[T0, T1](x0.atlas, x0.chart_at) }[M, E](c)
function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[M](x)
not c.chart_at(lib(functions).identity_fn(x)) ∈ c.atlas
not is_charted_space_data[M, E](c.atlas, c.chart_at) or (forall(x0: M) { x0 ∈ c.chart_at(x0).source } and forall(x1: M) { c.chart_at(x1) ∈ c.atlas })
(forall(x2: M) { c.chart_at(x2) ∈ c.atlas } = true)
function(x0: M) { c.chart_at(x0) ∈ c.atlas }(lib(functions).identity_fn(x))
function[T0, T1](x0: ChartedSpace[T0, T1], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.chart_at(x1).source }[M, E](c, x)
function(x0: Chart[M, E]) { not (x0 ∈ c.atlas and x ∈ x0.source) }(c.chart_at(x))
not c.chart_at(x) ∈ c.atlas or not x ∈ c.chart_at(x).source
function[T0, T1](x0: ChartedSpace[T0, T1], x1: T0) { x0.chart_at(x1).inv_fun(x0.chart_at(x1).to_fun(x1)) = x1 }[M, E](c, x)
function[T0, T1](x0: ChartedSpace[T0, T1], x1: T0) { x0.chart_at(x1) ∈ x0.atlas }[M, E](c, x)
c.chart_at(x).to_fun(x) ∈ c.chart_at(x).target
function(x0: Chart[M, E]) { not (x0 ∈ c.atlas and x ∈ x0.source and x0.to_fun(x) ∈ x0.target and x0.inv_fun(x0.to_fun(x)) = x) }(c.chart_at(x))
not (c.chart_at(x) ∈ c.atlas and x ∈ c.chart_at(x).source and c.chart_at(x).to_fun(x) ∈ c.chart_at(x).target) or c.chart_at(x).inv_fun(c.chart_at(x).to_fun(x)) != x
not (c.chart_at(x) ∈ c.atlas and x ∈ c.chart_at(x).source) or not c.chart_at(x).to_fun(x) ∈ c.chart_at(x).target or c.chart_at(x).inv_fun(c.chart_at(x).to_fun(x)) != x
not c.chart_at(x).to_fun(x) ∈ c.chart_at(x).target or c.chart_at(x).inv_fun(c.chart_at(x).to_fun(x)) != x or not c.chart_at(x) ∈ c.atlas or not x ∈ c.chart_at(x).source
function[T0](x0: T0) { x0 ∈ Set.universal_set[T0] }[M](x)
function[T0, T1](x0: T1, x1: T0) { constant[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0 }[M, Chart[M, E]](c, x)
exists(k0: M) { not k0 ∈ constant(c, k0).source }
let w0: M satisfy { not w0 ∈ constant(c, w0).source }
function(x0: M) { x0 ∈ constant(c, x0).source }(w0)
function[T0, T1](x0: T1, x1: T0) { constant[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0 }[M, Chart[M, E]](c, x)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.singleton[T0](x0) = (x0 = x1) }[Chart[M, E]](c, c)
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0) { Set.singleton[T0](x0).contains = function(x1: T0) { x0 = x1 } } }
c ∈ Set.singleton(c)
exists(k0: M) { not constant(c, k0) ∈ Set.singleton(c) }
let w0: M satisfy { not constant(c, w0) ∈ Set.singleton(c) }
function(x0: M) { constant(c, x0) ∈ Set.singleton(c) }(w0)

goal: is_charted_space_data[M, E](Set.singleton(c), constant[M, Chart[M, E]](c)) = (forall(x0: M) { constant[M, Chart[M, E]](c)(x0).source.contains(x0) } and forall(x1: M) { Set.singleton(c).contains(constant[M, Chart[M, E]](c)(x1)) })

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> Chart[T0, T1], x1: Set[Chart[T0, T1]]) { (forall(x2: T0) { x2 ∈ x0(x2).source } and forall(x3: T0) { x0(x3) ∈ x1 }) = is_charted_space_data[T0, T1](x1, x0) }[M, E](constant[M, Chart[M, E]](c), Set.singleton(c))

function[T0, T1](x0: Set[Chart[T0, T1]], x1: T0 -> Chart[T0, T1]) { not ChartedSpace.constraint[T0, T1](x0, x1) or exists(k0: ChartedSpace[T0, T1]) { Option.some[ChartedSpace[T0, T1]](k0) = ChartedSpace.new[T0, T1](x0, x1) } }[M, E](Set.singleton(c), constant[M, Chart[M, E]](c))
